title: Ethereal French Ovolimushroom Souffle
description: A spicy French brunch dish featuring ovoli mushroom and fry grind rice khao khua, served in a light and airy souffle form.
instructions: Butter a 1-quart souffle dish and coat with grated Gruy3re cheese.
Sift the flour over the butter and mix until well combined.
Heat the butter, onion, and garlic in a medium skillet over medium heat until the onion is translucent.
Add the cumin, coriander, and red pepper flakes; cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced ovoli mushroom and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cooked fry grind rice khao khua and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, Gruy3re cheese, and warmed chicken broth.
Add the egg mixture to the skillet and stir until combined.
Pour the egg mixture into the prepared souffle dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until puffed and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
